profile.name: Linear Orbit, Inc.
profile.summary: Linear is a purpose-built tool for tracking issues, managing sprints, and organizing project roadmaps in software development teams. Founded in 2019, it focuses on speed, efficiency, and a clean user experience to empower product teams to do their best work. Linear has become the tool of choice for over 25,000 companies including OpenAI, Coinbase, and Ramp, and operates as a profitable, high-growth, remote-first company.
profile.positioning: Linear is a high-performance, elegant issue tracking and project management tool designed specifically for software development teams, emphasizing speed, clarity, and user delight to empower product teams to build better software faster.

target_segment.evidence: Used by startups and large enterprises including OpenAI, Coinbase, Ramp, and Fortune 20 companies.

key_differentiator.value: Combines UI elegance with world-class performance and speed, designed specifically for software teams to streamline workflows and enhance productivity.

top_3_features: Issue tracking with custom fields and automated workflows

key_people.name: Karri Saarinen
key_people.background: Former principal designer and co-creator of design systems at Airbnb and founding designer at Coinbase; Y Combinator alumnus.

key_people.name: Tuomas Artman
key_people.background: 20+ years software engineer with experience at Uber and Groupon, responsible for technology strategy and engineering architecture at Linear.

key_people.name: Jori Lallo
key_people.background: Co-founder of Linear, involved in product and company founding.

growth_signals: Employee count grew to 178 by late 2025
Expanded internationally with distributed team across North America and Europe
Raised $82M Series C in 2025 at $1.25B valuation
Introduced AI-powered features and agent integrations

recent_news.headline: Post mortem on Linear security incident on March 24th, 2026
Linear raises $82 million Series C at $1.25 billion valuation
Linear raises $35 million Series B led by Accel
